metadata.description: Give Claude deep understanding of any video — 17 MCP tools and skills for extracting keyframes, OCR text, colors, motion, transcripts, and generating frontend code, PRDs, tests, and more.

plugins.name: video-insight
plugins.description: Give Claude deep understanding of any video. Extracts keyframes, OCR text, colors, motion events, cursor path, fonts, loading states, and confidence scores. 17 skills: build frontend code, design specs, tests, PRDs, changelogs, Storybook stories, Figma tokens, and more.
